title: Add generate() to ecdsa_native.rs
description: ecdsa_native.rs is missing EcdsaSigningKey::generate(). Add it using wc_ecc_make_key_ex + wc_InitRng/wc_FreeRng, same pattern as NistEcdhSecret::generate() in ecdh.rs. Must also attach RNG via wc_ecc_set_rng before wc_ecc_sign_hash in sign_prehash() to satisfy ECC_TIMING_RESISTANT on software builds.
